title: Refactor DIP-002 (DIP): Static initialization of concrete internal components.

detected_issue.description: Static initialization of concrete internal components.
detected_issue.reasoning: GsonBuilder hard-codes the creation of DEFAULT_CONSTRUCTOR_CONSTRUCTOR and DEFAULT_JSON_ADAPTER_ANNOTATION_TYPE_ADAPTER_FACTORY. This prevents the inversion of control and forces the library to always use these specific concrete implementations for its default state.

fix_logic.summary: Remove static initialization of concrete dependencies in GsonBuilder
fix_logic.rationale: The static fields DEFAULT_CONSTRUCTOR_CONSTRUCTOR and DEFAULT_JSON_ADAPTER_ANNOTATION_TYPE_ADAPTER_FACTORY tightly coupled GsonBuilder to specific implementations. By removing these static initializations and relying on instance-level creation or lazy initialization, we improve testability and adhere to the Dependency Inversion Principle.
